basic_details.job_title: TMC HBCHRC Foreman Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The latest HBCH Muzaffarpur Walk-in-Interview 2026 has been announced for Foreman (Electrical) post under Project! Walk-in-Interview is scheduled on Friday, 10th July 2026 (between 9:00 am to 10:00 am) at Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital and Research Centre, Muzaffarpur. This project-based vacancy is for services including Awareness and Screening for Head, Mouth, and Neck Cancer. Find all details about the HBCH Muzaffarpur Foreman vacancy 2026, including eligibility, remuneration, and walk-in details here.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 30 years (Age relaxation may be given to deserving bright candidates)
qualification.education_qualification: SSC + ITI (Electrical) 02 years full time course with 08 years post qualification experience OR ITI + NCTVT with 07 years experience OR Diploma in Electrical Engineering with 03 years post qualification experience. Candidate should have working experience in Electrical maintenance in Industrial/Commercial/Hospital organizations.

content_sections.heading: TMC HBCHRC Muzaffarpur Foreman Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital and Research Centre (HBCH&RC), Muzaffarpur under Tata Memorial Centre has invited applications for the post of Foreman (Electrical) on a project basis (Project A/C No. 5727). The appointment is initially for a period of six months or till the continuation of the project, whichever is earlier. Download HBCH Muzaffarpur Foreman Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TMC HBCHRC Muzaffarpur Project Vacancy 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: HBCH Muzaffarpur is conducting Walk-in-Interview for 01 post of Foreman (Electrical) under Bihar Government funded project.

rows.details: SSC + ITI (Electrical) 02 years full time course with 08 years post qualification experience OR ITI + NCTVT with 07 years experience OR Diploma in Electrical Engineering with 03 years post qualification experience. Candidate should have working experience in Electrical maintenance in Industrial/Commercial/Hospital organizations.
30 years (Age relaxation may be given to deserving bright candidates)

content_sections.heading: How to Attend Walk-in-Interview for HBCH Muzaffarpur Foreman Post
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible candidates may attend the Walk-in-Interview along with Bio-Data, Recent Passport Size Photograph, Original documents of PAN Card, Aadhar Card, Experience Certificates, Education Certificates and One Set of Self-Attested Copies of all certificates. Venue: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital and Research Centre, Shri Krishna Medical College and Hospital Campus, Umanagar, Muzaffarpur (Bihar) - 842004.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The appointment is purely project-based and temporary. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must bring all original documents for verification. Higher remuneration may be offered to deserving and bright candidates.

faq.question: Q1. What is HBCH Muzaffarpur Walk-in-Interview 2026?
faq.answer: Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital and Research Centre, Muzaffarpur is conducting a Walk-in-Interview on 10th July 2026 for the post of Foreman (Electrical) under a project funded by the Health Department, Government of Bihar for Head, Mouth, and Neck Cancer awareness and screening services.

faq.question: Q2. When is the Walk-in-Interview for Foreman (Electrical) at HBCH Muzaffarpur?
faq.answer: The Walk-in-Interview is scheduled on Friday, 10th July 2026 between 9:00 AM to 10:00 AM at HBCH&RC, Muzaffarpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Foreman (Electrical) at HBCH Muzaffarpur?
faq.answer: The monthly remuneration is Rs. 27,000/-. Higher remuneration may be offered to deserving and bright candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for Foreman (Electrical) post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have SSC + ITI (Electrical) with 08 years experience or ITI + NCTVT with 07 years experience or Diploma in Electrical Engineering with 03 years experience. Age limit is 30 years (relaxation possible for deserving candidates).

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for HBCH Muzaffarpur Foreman vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: This is a Walk-in-Interview post. Candidates must appear in person with all original documents, self-attested copies, bio-data, and passport size photograph at the venue on the specified date and time.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent job at Tata Memorial Centre Muzaffarpur?
faq.answer: No. The appointment is purely temporary and project-based, initially for six months or till the continuation of the project, whichever is earlier.
